3259110.name: Remnants of Lumira
3259110.description:
Remnants of Lumira is a fast paced story-based 3D platformer with a retro aesthetic.

You wake up as a mouse named "Furvolt" unaware of your sense of time, but desperate to find answers.


Features

  • Multiple playable characters as you progress

  • An expanding move set as the story progresses

  • 5 Unique Worlds with their own series of levels and aesthetic

  • Engaging platforming gameplay accommodating for the casual 3d platforming fan, to the most seasoned veterans.

  • An original soundtrack

  • Secret/multiple endings(?!)

Progress through a series of levels within 5 Worlds, where you unlock new abilities to better circumnavigate your environments, while also progressing through the story and unlocking new characters throughout your journey!
